name: Old World Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Use enough ingredients for your family. For 2 adults, use 3 chicken breasts and cheese slices.
2. Use about 1/3 cup of breadcrumbs and less than 1/4 cup of wine (non-alcoholic zinfandel is acceptable).
3. Pound the chicken to flatten it slightly using a meat mallet or heavy cup.
4. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Coat the chicken with breadcrumbs.
6. Place the chicken in a single layer baking dish and sprinkle with about 1-2 tablespoons of wine.
7. Bake for 20-30 minutes.
8. Remove the chicken from the oven and place a slice of cheese on each piece.
9. Sprinkle with 2-3 tablespoons of wine.
10. Turn the oven up to 350 degrees Fahrenheit and bake another 20-30 minutes.
This simple dish is surprisingly delicious!
